trades.reasoning: INFQ has dropped off the screener entirely, signaling loss of momentum; rotating proceeds into a higher-conviction name with score 95.
Score 95 with RSI 55.3 places it in the healthy bullish momentum zone — not overbought — with MACD bullish crossover and rising histogram; best risk-adjusted entry in today's screener.

decisions.briefing: Markets were quiet today with the S&P 500 up 0.3% and NASDAQ up 0.2% — a broadly neutral session. Cash sits at $320 which is below the $500 threshold for a standalone new buy, so the right move is to rotate: sell INFQ which has disappeared from the screener (momentum gone) and redeploy into TBBB, the only score-95 name with an RSI still in the healthy 55–70 zone rather than overbought. This fills one of three open slots without adding risk in a stretched market where most candidates are RSI 70+.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities edged higher in a low-conviction session, with the S&P 500 gaining 0.3% and the NASDAQ adding 0.2% as investors balanced resilient economic data against lingering uncertainty around Federal Reserve rate-cut timing. Breadth was positive but narrow, with technology and enterprise software names driving most of the gains while defensive sectors lagged. The muted tape reflects a market that has already priced in significant optimism — evidenced by the large number of individual stocks hitting RSI readings above 80 — leaving limited room for further upside without fresh catalysts.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日窄幅上揚，標普500指數微升0.3%，納斯達克上漲0.2%，市場整體氣氛審慎樂觀。科技股與企業軟件板塊為主要動力，惟成交量偏淡，顯示市場缺乏明確方向。在聯儲局減息時機仍存變數的背景下，不少個股RSI已升至80以上的超買水平，意味短期上行空間受限，投資者需留意獲利回吐風險。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum rotation is the strategy of selling positions that have lost their price momentum and redeploying that capital into stocks showing stronger, fresher momentum signals. The idea is that stocks in motion tend to stay in motion — so you want your money in names where buyers are actively in control, not ones where the trend has already faded. Today's trade — out of INFQ (off the screener) and into TBBB (score 95, RSI 55) — is a textbook example.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能輪動是指賣出已失去價格趨勢的持倉，將資金轉移至動能更強的股票。核心邏輯是「強者恆強」——當買盤力量持續推動某隻股票上漲，往往會吸引更多資金跟進，形成正向循環。今日將INFQ換入TBBB的操作，正是動能輪動的典型應用：放棄訊號消退的持倉，追入技術面最佳、且RSI仍處健康區間的候選標的。
